title: Date & Time Functions
description: Fungsi-fungsi untuk manipulasi tanggal dan waktu di MySQL.

commands.name: NOW-CURDATE
commands.title: NOW / CURDATE / CURTIME
commands.description: Mengambil tanggal dan waktu saat ini.
commands.examples:
SELECT NOW();  -- '2024-01-15 10:30:00'
SELECT CURDATE();  -- '2024-01-15'
SELECT CURTIME();  -- '10:30:00'
SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP();  -- epoch timestamp
SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(1705312200);

commands.name: DATE_FORMAT
commands.title: DATE_FORMAT
commands.description: Memformat tanggal ke string dengan format tertentu.

commands.name: DATE_ADD-SUB
commands.title: DATE_ADD / DATE_SUB
commands.description: Menambah atau mengurangi interval dari tanggal.
commands.syntax: DATE_ADD(date, INTERVAL n unit) / DATE_SUB(date, INTERVAL n unit)

commands.name: DATEDIFF
commands.title: DATEDIFF / TIMESTAMPDIFF

commands.name: EXTRACT
commands.title: EXTRACT / YEAR / MONTH / DAY
commands.syntax: EXTRACT(unit FROM date) / YEAR(date) / MONTH(date) / DAY(date)

commands.name: STR_TO_DATE
commands.title: STR_TO_DATE
